facebook.caption:
POV: you took the slow road to Cửa Cạn River and ended up spinning in a basket boat through the mangroves.

Eco Tour Thái Dương makes this happen. 4.3 stars across 94 reviews. Small group. Real river. None of the resort-pool crowd.

This is the Phu Quoc most tourists skip because they never leave the beach strip. Don't be that tourist.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Basket boat. Cửa Cạn River. Mangroves closing in on both sides. This is what Phu Quoc looks like when you get off the beach. Eco Tour Thái Dương. 4.3★, 94 reviews. Worth every minute.

instagram.caption:
Took a wrong turn toward Cửa Cạn River. Ended up in a basket boat. Best wrong turn in Phu Quoc.

Eco Tour Thái Dương. 4.3★. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Spinning through the mangroves at Cửa Cạn River. Basket boats, calm water, zero crowds. Eco Tour Thái Dương delivers.
